sentences.english: My phone battery dies so fast, it's ridiculous.
I have to charge it three times a day.
sentences.korean: 말도 안 돼요. 하루에 세 번 충전해야 해요.

sentences.english: My Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting, and I work from home so it's a huge problem.
sentences.korean: 와이파이가 자꾸 끊기고 재택근무라서 큰 문제예요.

sentences.english: I accidentally deleted all my photos from my phone last week.
sentences.korean: 지난주에 실수로 폰의 사진을 다 삭제했어요.

sentences.english: Years of memories gone in one second.
